summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of SwarmOS final iteration. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows (Landing, 5-step Onboarding with AI Preview, Dashboard with all views) working correctly. Stripe integration, OpenAI email generation, and logout all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Resend email sending not integrated - no actual emails sent
MOCKED: Gmail inbox reading is simulated
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup: 1 demo user, 5 leads, 1 campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final iteration tested successfully. All features working: Landing page (navbar, hero, social proof, features, pricing, footer), 5-step Onboarding wizard (Email, Target, Offer, Volume, AI Preview with Regenerate), Dashboard (sidebar nav, KPI cards, multiple views, upgrade to Stripe $99/mo, logout). Backend tests cover: health, login, stats, leads CRUD, outreach, dashboard, meetings, automation, onboarding, AI email generation with target/offer (OpenAI GPT-4o), AI reply classification, Stripe checkout.

landing_page.navbar: SwarmOS logo, Login link, Start Free Trial CTA - all working
landing_page.hero_section: Heading, description, Start Free Trial and Book Demo buttons - all working
landing_page.feature_cards: 4 feature cards (Define ICP, AI emails, Automated outreach, Meetings booked) - visible
landing_page.pricing_section: Free ($0) and Pro ($99) plans with CTAs - working

onboarding_wizard_5_steps.step_labels: Email, Target, Offer, Volume, Preview icons and labels - visible
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.step_2_target: Input field, Continue button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.step_3_offer: Input field, Continue button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.step_4_volume: Input field, Continue button, Back button - working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.step_5_ai_preview: AI-generated email preview, Regenerate button, Launch AI System button - all working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.ai_email_generation: OpenAI GPT-4o generates personalized email based on target/offer - working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.regenerate_button: Generates new AI email on click - working
onboarding_wizard_5_steps.submission: Creates user via POST /api/login, saves onboarding via POST /api/onboarding, redirects to /dashboard - working

dashboard.sidebar: SwarmOS logo, nav items (Dashboard, Outreach, Meetings, Analytics, Settings), Upgrade card, Logout button - all visible
dashboard.topbar: View title, welcome message with email, plan badge - working
dashboard.kpi_cards: Emails Sent, Replies, Meetings Booked, Total Leads - all visible with data-testid
dashboard.nav_switching: Clicking nav items switches views correctly - working
dashboard.analytics_view: Reply Rate, Conversion, Contacted KPIs - working
dashboard.upgrade_button: Triggers Stripe checkout at $99/mo - working (verified redirect to checkout.stripe.com)
dashboard.logout_button: Clears localStorage (user and onboarding) and redirects to landing page - working

backend_apis.GET /api/stats: Returns stats object with leads, contacted, sent, replies, booked - working
backend_apis.POST /api/generate-email (leadId): Generates AI email for specific lead using OpenAI GPT-4o - working
backend_apis.POST /api/generate-email (target/offer): Generates AI email preview for onboarding using OpenAI GPT-4o - working
backend_apis.POST /api/classify-reply: Classifies email reply sentiment using OpenAI GPT-4o - working
backend_apis.POST /api/subscribe: Creates Stripe checkout session at $99/mo - working
